focus: Research Table deep parity + ConfigResearch audit
strict_parity_rule: No invented research keys, pages, GUI buttons, recipes, or survival mechanics were added.
changes: Added TC4ResearchFlagPolicy so ConfigResearch flags are handled in one guarded place.
Research Table note target selection now refuses auto_unlock/stub/hidden/lost entries instead of fabricating normal research notes for them.
Thaumonomicon layout now keeps hidden/lost entries invisible until real trigger/unlock, while concealed entries can reveal after real parents/hidden parents are complete.
Research notes now persist original TC4 research-note NBT metadata: category, parents, hidden parents, siblings, flags, warp and complexity.
Research note required-aspect generation now uses original ConfigResearch aspect tags first and only supplements one-tag entries from original aspect components, not string-key guesses.
RequestSelectResearchPacket now routes through the research-table selection gate and reports rejected original entries clearly.

audit.checks: version, flag policy markers, selection gating, hidden/lost visibility, research note metadata NBT, original aspect tag usage

still not 100% original yet: Research Table GUI still needs pixel-by-pixel comparison against GuiResearchTable drawing order and mouse behaviour.
ResearchNote generation still uses a deterministic Forge 1.19.2 adapter for the old RNG/state sync path.
Thaumonomicon pages still need a full ConfigResearch page/icon/materialized recipe sweep.
Some special/lost/hidden unlock paths still need exact scan/event trigger parity.
next_stage: Stage603-622: Research Table pixel/mouse parity, scribing tools ink/damage audit, paper/note conversion details, exact ConfigResearch page/icon/recipe gates, and hidden/lost trigger checks.
